Package com.here.platform.location.core.graph.patch

Interface VirtualIndexCodec<V,E>

Type Parameters:
V - The vertex type of the graph.
E - The edge type of the graph.
All Superinterfaces:
VirtualVertexCodec<V>
public interface VirtualIndexCodec<V,E> extends VirtualVertexCodec<V>
A codec that encodes and decodes virtual vertices and edges within the concrete vertex/edge types V and E of a patched graph.

Virtual vertices and edges are synthetic graph elements introduced by a patch — they exist in the patched graph but not in the original. Each virtual vertex is identified by a zero-based VirtualVertexCodec.virtualVertexIndex(V) and each virtual edge by a zero-based virtualEdgeIndex(E).

Implementations pack these indices inside the existing types V and E (for example by using a reserved tile id), avoiding new type allocations while still allowing virtual elements to be distinguished from original ones at runtime.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isVirtualEdge(E e)
    Returns `true` if `e` is a virtual edge, i.e.
    E
    virtualEdge(VirtualEdgeIndex edgeIndex, V source, V target)
    Creates a virtual edge identified by its index, source, and target.
    VirtualEdgeIndex
    virtualEdgeIndex(E e)
    Returns the zero-based index of a virtual edge of the patched graph.

    Methods inherited from interface com.here.platform.location.core.graph.patch.VirtualVertexCodec

    isVirtualVertex, virtualVertex, virtualVertexIndex

  • Method Details

    • isVirtualEdge

      boolean isVirtualEdge(E e)
      Returns `true` if `e` is a virtual edge, i.e. an edge whose source is a virtual vertex.

    • virtualEdge

      E virtualEdge(VirtualEdgeIndex edgeIndex, V source, V target)
      Creates a virtual edge identified by its index, source, and target.

      This is the inverse of virtualEdgeIndex(E): virtualEdgeIndex(virtualEdge(i, s, t)) == i.

      Parameters:
      edgeIndex - Zero-based index of the edge in the patched graph's edge space.
      source - The source vertex of the edge (a virtual vertex).
      target - The target vertex of the edge (virtual or original).

    • virtualEdgeIndex

      VirtualEdgeIndex virtualEdgeIndex(E e)
      Returns the zero-based index of a virtual edge of the patched graph.

      Parameters:
      e - A virtual edge.
